description_long: This helmet features a bold, angular design with pronounced geometric ridges and layered segments, giving it a futuristic and armored appearance. The structure is primarily composed of metallic material with a dark bronze or brass finish, exhibiting a glossy sheen. The front section is open, with two prominent vertical extensions that frame the face, while the sides and back are reinforced with overlapping plates. The top of the helmet is adorned with upward-pointing, arrow-like projections, adding to its aggressive aesthetic. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or graphic embellishments, and the interior appears hollow, designed to fit over the head. The overall construction suggests durability and protection, suitable for ceremonial or stylized urban use.
description: A metallic, angular helmet with layered plates and a dark bronze glossy finish, featuring bold geometric ridges and open face design. The helmet has upward-pointing projections and no visible visor or graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open face design, central vertical split, and two prominent vertical extensions framing the face.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the layered, overlapping plates and the angular, stepped structure along the side and top.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the continuous band structure, the hollow interior, and the symmetrical arrangement of the upward-pointing projections.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the same angular, stepped layers and the pronounced vertical extension.
